name: Makenzie
ai_summary: Makenzie has extensive experience working with all age groups from infants to school-age, including coaching sports and dance. She believes conflicts help children grow and handles them by talking through emotions and reinforcing positive interactions.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Mackenzie Swan and I have worked with all ages. I worked with infants Toddlers, and preschool, school age, and then a little bit older as well. I have I played Sports all of high school. So, I did various different Sports Camps. So I was coaching and teaching basketball to kids, as well as dance coaching, and teaching dance to kids.
 I also was working with the company called teachers for tomorrow in Minnesota, which is pretty similar. It's a sub company and they would place you. Add take care of preschools School are before and after school programs, any place that needed help with Subs. So, that's where I worked with the many different ages of kids. I do also have a toddler of my own, I love working with kids and being with kids, I love helping them grow seeing their personalities.
 Just kind of walking through life with them. I feel like daycare is really what starts a child's life and just being able to be a part of that and helping them and learning with them and being with them is something that I've always found. Just so rewarding.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Surprise Arizona. I would say I am willing to travel 30 to 45 minutes to a center to help out.

Before his daycare closes, I definitely can be flexible with those. His dad is able to pick him up and drop him off on some days as well.
 As my mother-in-law. So I am pretty flexible but I would love to work every day if I could,
